blocks.title: Ողջույն...
blocks.body: Գեղեցիկ React կայքեր WordPress կառավարմամբ և հոսթինգով միասին
Արագ, ժամանակակից և հարմարավետ կայքեր՝ առցանց խանութի, բովանդակության կառավարման և ամբողջական տեխնիկական սպասարկման հնարավորությամբ։

blocks.title: Beautiful React Websites with WordPress CMS & WooCommerce built in.
blocks.body: A premium React frontend connected to WordPress content, WooCommerce products, cart, checkout, account tools, dashboard editing, hosting, and support.

badges.label: React
badges.title: Modern frontend
badges.body: Fast, polished pages with app-like interaction.

badges.label: Woo
badges.title: Live commerce
badges.body: Products, cart, checkout, account, and orders.

badges.label: CMS
badges.title: WordPress editing
badges.body: Menus, media, pages, forms, and product content.

badges.label: Host
badges.title: Managed hosting
badges.body: A simpler path from build to launch.

gridItems.title: Storefront pages
gridItems.text: Homepage, shop archive, product pages, search, account, cart, and checkout can live in one polished frontend.

gridItems.title: Product selling flow
gridItems.text: Product cards, options, add to cart, mini cart, checkout, and customer account logic stay connected.

gridItems.title: Content control
gridItems.text: Clients keep the familiar WordPress admin for products, menus, media, pages, forms, and content.

gridItems.title: Visual editing
gridItems.text: Reusable sections and templates let the site keep evolving without rebuilding the architecture.

sections.title: What clients get in one website system.
sections.body: The public site feels modern and fast, while the business still manages content and commerce through WordPress and WooCommerce.

badges.title: React frontend
badges.body: Premium presentation, responsive layouts, smooth interactions, and flexible page templates.

badges.title: WooCommerce shop
badges.body: Product archive, product detail pages, wishlist, cart, checkout, and customer accounts.

badges.title: WordPress CMS
badges.body: Menus, media, product data, forms, content, and business editing stay in WordPress.

badges.title: Dashboard builder
badges.body: Create pages, adjust layouts, reuse templates, and tune the storefront visually.

sections.title: Live WooCommerce shop grid
sections.body: Real imported products, prices, options, wishlist, and add-to-cart behavior rendered through the React frontend.

sections.title: Product pages that feel like a brand experience.
sections.body: The same system supports beautiful product pages with gallery, options, add to cart, product details, related browsing, and checkout flow.

blocks.title: Gallery, price, product options, add to cart, wishlist, and checkout stay connected.
blocks.body: Use WooCommerce for product management and React for the customer experience. Product pages can be designed as templates and still use live WooCommerce data.

blocks.title: Included product flow
items: Add to cart and mini cart

sections.title: From idea to live website without splitting the stack.
sections.body: A clear service path for clients who want a modern website, practical editing, commerce, hosting, and support together.

badges.title: Sell online
badges.body: Use WooCommerce checkout, cart, customer accounts, and orders.

blocks.title: Website, CMS, commerce, hosting, and support in one plan.
blocks.body: Clients do not need to assemble React hosting, WordPress maintenance, WooCommerce setup, SSL, updates, and support separately.

gridItems.title: Commerce setup
gridItems.text: WooCommerce product and checkout flow connected to the frontend.

gridItems.text: Help with updates, page edits, improvements, and launch needs.
